title: Recipe Advancements Yeeter
description: Yeets only-recipe advancements, or removes recipe rewards from other advancements. As well as disabling recipe unlock toasts.
body:
Clears your game from advancements that only exist for recipe purposes, and removes recipe unlocks from all others. [server-sided]

Additionally, disables recipe unlock toasts showing up in a vanilla way. [client-sided]

Simple performance-improving mod offering no compromises for your game's stability.

Also disables advancements telemetry since version 1.1
